reviews.review_msg: Chris is an excellent teacher. While he grades on a difficult scale, he provides clear feedback to students on assignments (and in office hours), cares about the wellbeing of students, and encourages students in their understanding and writing skills. Lectures cover fundamentals and well-regarded papers from across development economics.

Incredibly good at her job. Wholeheartedly inspired and inspiring. It's so hard to find a professor that genuinely sparks thought and makes you care beyond class. Absolutely love her teaching style, her approach is that of an elementary school teacher in the way she's genuinely curious about her students, the course, and everything around us

One of the best professors I had in SFU, I took two other courses with her and I would take more! Her lectures and seminars are extremely interesting and she's so passionate about teaching. Love all the courses i took with her!
